title: 添加 useMemo 优化：AgentSelect.selectableIds + EditToolExpandedDiff.contents
description: 修复 PERF-003 和 PERF-004：AgentSelect 中 selectableIds 每帧重建 Set，EditToolExpandedDiff 中 contents 每次渲染创建新对象
action: 1) AgentSelect.tsx L56: const selectableIds = useMemo(() => new Set<string>(agents.map((agent) => agent.id)), [agents]); 2) EditToolExpandedDiff.tsx L25: const contents: FileContents = useMemo(() => ({ original: oldString, modified: newString, language: 'text' }), [oldString, newString]); 需要先添加 useMemo import

criteria: AgentSelect.tsx L56 包含 'useMemo(() => new Set<string>'
cd apps/desktop && bun run typecheck 退出码 0
convergence.definition_of_done: 两个组件中的派生数据使用 useMemo 缓存，避免不必要的重计算

files.change: 从 'const selectableIds = new Set<string>(...)' 改为 'const selectableIds = useMemo(() => new Set<string>(...), [agents])'
从 'const contents: FileContents = {...}' 改为 'const contents: FileContents = useMemo(() => ({...}), [oldString, newString])'

implementation: AgentSelect.tsx: 添加 useMemo 到 react import，将 L56 selectableIds 用 useMemo 包裹
EditToolExpandedDiff.tsx: 添加 useMemo 到 react import，将 L25-29 contents 用 useMemo 包裹
运行 bun run typecheck 验证

rationale.chosen_approach: 使用 useMemo 包裹派生数据，避免不必要的对象重建
